name: Double Diamond
description: Problem space (Discover fan -> Define waist) then solution space (Develop fan + prototype -> Deliver waist). Frame an ambiguous problem and take it to a buildable solution.
when_to_use: When you have a 'How Might We' question and want a rigorous problem framing plus a tested, buildable solution spec.

steps.name: Discover
steps.intent: Surface the real, lived pains broadly across personas and angles. No solutions yet. Anti-steering is strongest here.

steps.name: Define
steps.intent: Cluster the breadth into ONE core problem and a sharp Point-of-View (who + needs what + surprising insight). Frame the next How-Might-We.

steps.name: Develop
steps.intent: Generate multiple solution candidates from the POV and build at least one real, minimal prototype to test.

steps.name: Deliver
steps.intent: Have personas actually USE the prototype(s), then converge to a buildable specification (must-haves, who-for, validated solves, open risks).
